originalTitle: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY "Hulk Smash Spidey" Trailer (NEW 2026)
content: The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW. It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see. Wanna support us? Get your JoBlo Merch right here! https://joblo-merch.creator-spring.com/ #4kTrailer
chineseSummary: JoBlo 电影网 · 689,249 次观看
chineseContent: 世界可能已经忘记了彼得·帕克，但他没有忘记他们。 #SpiderManBrandNewDay，7 月 31 日上映。门票现已发售。对于彼得·帕克来说，这是全新的一天。作为蜘蛛侠，在一个不记得他的世界里全职打击犯罪，以及看着他的老朋友在没有他的情况下继续前进的压力，引发了彼得的改变，他可能无法控制。但这种转变也可能是唯一能够阻止对这座城市和他所爱的人的令人震惊的新威胁——一个没人能看到的强大恶棍。想支持我们吗？在这里购买您的 JoBlo 商品！ https://joblo-merch.creator-spring.com/#4kTrailer
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
